description: Shared package (proposed slug `release-verification-notifications`) that any release app embeds. Watches the release-ops catalog for items where any LaunchGate.requiresHumanVisualVerification is reached AND no matching HumanVisualVerification exists yet. Schedules a local UNUserNotificationCenter notification with the release item's title + the artifact path + a deep-link URL that opens the embedding release app directly to the ReleaseVerificationView for that item. Re-fires every N hours until the human responds. Notification permission requested at app first-launch as part of the standard onboarding flow. Honors operator preference for quiet hours / batched delivery — schema TBD on this turn but a `verificationNotificationPolicy` field on the release-ops item is the natural place. First consumer: launch-calendar.
title: Build release-verification-notifications: schedule UNUserNotification when a release item enters the human-verification gate
